name: Avon Elementary School
description: Avon Elementary School is a place to play pickleball in Avon, CO. There are 6 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms.
open_play_schedule: Not open for the season until April

name: Avon tennis and pickleball
description: Avon tennis and pickleball is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Avon, CO. There are 6 outdoor acrylic courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include restrooms, water, a pro shop or equipment store, and trainers or lessons. You can’t reserve the courts. The courts are free.

name: Donovan Park
description: Come play pickleball at Donovan Park in Vail, CO! There are 3 outdoor courts. You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water.

name: EagleVail Colorado
description: Come play pickleball at EagleVail Colorado in Vail, CO! There are 9 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A one-time fee is required to play. Players have access to restrooms and water.
fees: Fee required — $10 drop in for non-residents

name: El Jebel
description: Come play pickleball at El Jebel in El Jebel, CO! There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Golden Peak Pickleball Center
description: Golden Peak Pickleball Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Vail, CO. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water. You can reserve the courts. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Gypsum Creek Golf Course
description: Gypsum Creek Golf Course is a place to play pickleball in Gypsum, CO. There are 8 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include food and restrooms. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Gypsum Recreation Center
description: Gypsum Recreation Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Gypsum, CO. There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to food, restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility. The courts are free.

name: Highlands Lodge by Beaver Creek Mountain
description: Come play pickleball at Highlands Lodge by Beaver Creek Mountain in Beaver Creek, CO! There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to a pro shop or equipment store, restrooms, and water. The courts are private.

name: Red Sandstone Elementary School
description: Red Sandstone Elementary School is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Vail, CO. There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms and water.
